hero.headline: I build agent systems that do real work.
hero.sub: Voice agents that answer phones. An agent team that ships code. Pipelines that cut manual prospecting by 80%. I design multi-agent systems end-to-end and pick the stack per problem, not per habit.

about: I'm an AI engineering student at Esprit in Tunis, and a freelance software engineer for a Paris B2B SaaS, where I ship backend, AI, and frontend features across a multi-tenant sales-outreach platform.

My work centers on multi-agent systems: give each agent one narrow job, wire them together, and measure whether the result actually saves time. Most of what I've automated sits where businesses feel it daily, from sales pipelines and marketing content to recruitment and operations.
Away from the keyboard I'm a scout leader with the Tunisian Scouts and a member of JCI Kelibia.
